title: eryngium pristis
intro: Eryngium pristis, also known as the sea holly, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eryngium pristis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
